rationales_first_seed.2025-05: BoK_CSI 트렌드: 직전 6개월(2024-10 to 2025-04) 값은 101.6, 100.6, 98.2, 100.7, 103.6, 91.0, 95.0, 93.6로, 3월 급락 후 4월 소폭 회복세. 방향성은 소비심리 약세 지속이나 최근 안정화 신호. 인플레이션 압력은 완만하며, 소비 회복이 제한적이나 원자재 가격(33.72)과 미 고용지표(108.0)가 상방 압력. 매크로 변수: 기준금리 동결 기조, 원/달러 약세(0.628)로 수입물가 부담, base effect 약화(작년 4월 2.079). 종합: CPI YoY는 2.10로 전망. 가중치는 BoK_CSI 40% (소비심리 회복 기대), 원자재/고용 30%, base effect 30%.
rationales_first_seed.2025-06: BoK_CSI rose to 101.7 in May 2025, signaling improving consumer sentiment and potential inflation pressures. Despite a recent CPI YoY dip to 1.902 (May), upward CSI momentum suggests demand-driven inflation. Base effects may stabilize as YoY comparisons shift to lower 2024 inflation months. Weight: 60% CSI, 30% commodity prices (Pork↑), 10% macro cross-check (modest PPI↓, KR_MfgProd volatility).
rationales_first_seed.2025-07: BoK_CSI 트렌드: 최근 6개월(2025.05-2025.06) 값은 101.7, 108.6로 상승 추세. CSI 방향성 → 소비자 낙관 강화로 인플레 압력 상승. 매크로 cross-check: BoK 금리 안정(0.77-0.82), 원자재/FX 약세(THB_USD 2.628)로 수입 물가 상승, base effect(6월 2.17 vs 2024.06 2.054) 중립. 종합 → BoK_CSI(40%)와 FX(30%) 가중치로 2.25% 전망.
rationales_first_seed.2025-08: BoK_CSI rose from 95.0 (2025-02) to 110.7 (2025-07), signaling strengthening consumer optimism. This upward trend (weighted 40%) suggests demand-pull inflation. Pork prices (105.674 in 2025-07, +20% YoY) add inflationary pressure, while lower PPI_CopperNickel (32.441, -7% YoY) offsets partially. US_NFP (64.0 in 2025-07, +3.1% MoM) supports wage growth (20% weight). Base effect from August 2024 CPI_KR_YoY at 2.013 (20% weight) moderates YoY acceleration. Net: 2.15, balancing CSI-driven demand and cost-mix factors.
rationales_first_seed.2025-09: BoK_CSI rose from 93.6 (May) to 111.2 (Aug), signaling improved consumer optimism and potential inflation pressure. However, US_NFP turned sharply negative (-70 in Aug), and PPI_CopperNickel eased to 32.4, suggesting weakening demand. August CPI YoY dropped to 1.668 from July's 2.094, reflecting base effects and softening momentum. Balancing rising sentiment (50% weight) against macro headwinds (30%) and prior month's decline (20%), a moderated inflation forecast of 1.7 is calibrated.
rationales_first_seed.2025-10: BoK_CSI rose from 93.6 (Apr) to 110.0 (Sep), signaling strong consumer optimism. This supports inflationary pressures via heightened demand. Cross-checking: recent CPI_KR_YoY rebounded to 2.102 (Sep) after August's dip, suggesting persistent underlying inflation. Base effect benefits as September 2024 CPI was lower (1.668). FX (THB_USD stable) and commodity prices (PPI_CopperNickel down) offset slightly. Weights: BoK_CSI (40%), CPI trend (30%), base effect (20%), others (10%).
rationales_first_seed.2025-11: BoK_CSI (Oct: 109.6, Sep: 110.0) shows slight optimism decline but remains above 109. Direction suggests moderate inflation pressure. Macro cross-check: Recent US_NFP (-140) signals labor weakness, dampening CPI; THB_USD and FX stability limit import effects. Base effect (prior month: 2.38) supports upward trend. Weighted forecast: 40% BoK_CSI, 30% labor/USD, 30% base effect.
rationales_first_seed.2025-12: BoK_CSI rose to 112.3 in Nov 2025 (from 109.6 in Oct), signaling strengthening consumer optimism. This CSI direction implies rising household spending pressures. Macro checks: CPI_KR_YoY rose 2.448% in Nov vs 2.380% in Oct, while Pork inflation reached 83.8 (Nov) vs 93.9 (Oct), suggesting transient commodity impacts. Base effect neutral as Nov 2024 CPI was 2.273. Weighing CSI (35%), recent CPI momentum (45%), and commodity drag (20%) yields 2.5% forecast.
